title: Create approval_flows and approval_flow_steps migrations
acceptance_criteria: approval_flows table created with columns: id, name, model_type, description (nullable), timestamps
approval_flow_steps table created with columns: id, approval_flow_id (FK), role_id (FK to roles), step_order, timestamps
Unique constraint on approval_flow_id + step_order in approval_flow_steps
Foreign key on role_id references Spatie roles table
Foreign key on approval_flow_id references approval_flows with cascade delete
